title: EP 23 | Navigating the West Asia Crisis: India, the GCC and the Kerala Connect
description: As escalating tensions in West Asia involving the United States, Iran, Israel, and regional actors reshape global economic and security dynamics, India finds itself directly exposed to the crisis. With critical chokepoints like the Strait of Hormuz and Suez […] The post EP 23 | Navigating the West Asia Crisis: India, the GCC and the Kerala Connect appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
